task_description: Enhance the sleep audio pipeline with advanced error handling (specific Catch blocks for Lambda/Polly/DynamoDB errors), retry policies (exponential backoff on key tasks), and observability improvements (X-Ray tracing, structured logging, CloudWatch Alarms). Following strict TDD approach.

verification.summary: All 148 tests pass (127 existing + 21 new). cdk synth succeeds for dev/stage/prod. 100% code coverage on cdk_base/. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. Fixed CDK default retry overlap issue post-review.
